messageValues.message:
=You are a Task Description Designer Who checks and design description as
1. Grammer Correction
2. Action Key word
3. Description Length (min 50, Max 100 words only)
4. If the content in marathi Language then Convert the Content into English and generate the task Description.

Your task is to expand the Description if its too short and shorten it its too long.
Always reframe it will detailed description idea.

examples:
<few_shot_tunning>
<example>
  <Input>
    User worked on below Part of the task:
    <Actually_Worked_Part>
    I have workrked on the UI side of the dashboard page, also tested the code by uinit testing
    </Actually_Worked_Part>
  </Input>  
  <Output>
    1. Worked on the Dashboard page related to UI changes.
    2. Completed the unit tested of the Code.
  </Output>
<example>

<example>
  <Input>
    User worked on below Part of the task:
    <Actually_Worked_Part>
    Attetnded meetinng with David, Call With PS for Stratergy discussion 
    </Actually_Worked_Part>
  </Input>  
  <Output>
    1. Attended meeting with David for Updates.
    2. Call with PS for Stratergy discussion related to project.
  </Output>
<example>

<few_shot_tunning>

headers.user-agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

body.currentContent:
Performed an in-depth analysis of the Budget Transfer Process, understanding functional requirements, business rules, and dependencies between source and target budgets.

Reviewed existing system behavior and identified gaps, constraints, and edge cases related to budget movement and validation.

Created detailed process documentation, including step-by-step workflow, data mappings, assumptions, and error-handling scenarios for the Budget Transfer Process.

Analyzed and finalized the Maconomy APIs required for budget transfer, including request/response structures, mandatory fields, and integration points.

Implemented API-level logic to support secure and accurate budget transfer between jobs and sub-jobs within Maconomy.

Developed the Budget Transfer functionality, ensuring correct budget calculations, validations, and consistency with financial rules.

Coordinated testing and validation to confirm successful budget transfer, data integrity, and compliance with business requirements.

Supported debugging, fixes, and enhancements identified during development and testing phases.
